## Fixed

- **Rename `PUnit.Process` to `PUnit.Subprocess`** — avoids shadowing Pike's system `Process` module when `import PUnit` is used alongside `Process.run()` calls. No more forwarding workaround needed (fixes #6)

## Breaking Changes

- **`PUnit.Process` renamed to `PUnit.Subprocess`** — update any code using `import PUnit.Process` to `import PUnit.Subprocess`

## Baseline

- **177 passed, 4 skipped, 0 failures**
